GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to Revenue or any government system. A human (the taxpayer) must review every value below, confirm it is correct — including recomputing the Panel P self-assessment figures, which this packet reproduces as illustrative mock data only and does not itself calculate — and explicitly authorize submission through Revenue's own channel (the Revenue Online Service, ROS, or the paper Form 11S) before this return is filed.
